reason: Successfully tested browser-use feature by sending a message to open https://example.com, agent executed browser tools, and returned the correct page title "Example Domain" in the response.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the SuperAgent home page with the agent list visible in the sidebar.
Step 2: Found the "QA-20260614-211428-rooo" agent in the sidebar and clicked it - Successfully opened the agent, displaying the chat interface and agent details panel.
Step 3: Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message was successfully entered in the input box and sent via the Send message button.
Step 4: Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) - Agent completed execution in 19 seconds, well within the timeout limit. The agent executed the following browser operations:

Step 5: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly shows: "The page title is "Example Domain"." The agent provided a comprehensive summary: "I opened https://example.com — the page title is "Example Domain". Browser closed."
